---
title: "TimeAnalysis"
subtitle: "Signal processing · ML/DL · Automated trading research"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
We are building an automated trading system capable of winning in **more than 60% of cases**.  
This site documents our research journey: from raw signal theory to production-ready algorithms.
:::

---

## What's inside

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card}
### 🚀 Quick Start
Get your environment running in minutes.  
Install dependencies, fetch your first market data, and run your first signal transform.

[Get started →](quickstart/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card}
### 📐 Algorithms
Core signal processing and ML/DL building blocks.  
Each article walks through the math, the code, and the intuition side by side.

[Browse algorithms →](algorithms/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card}
### 🔬 Research
Exploratory data analysis, experiments, and findings.  
Living documents updated as the project evolves.

[Read research →](research/index.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Our Manifesto

| Principle | What it means in practice |
|-----------|--------------------------|
| 🌐 **English** | All code, docs, and discussion in English |
| 🔍 **Code review** | Nothing ships without a second pair of eyes |
| 🏗️ **Product mindset** | We are building a real commercial product |
| 🤖 **Honest AI use** | AI for viz & reference only — core logic is ours |
| 📖 **Clear docs** | Readable by non-professionals |

---

## Latest updates

| Date | Topic | Section |
|------|-------|---------|
| 2026-04-01 | Fourier Transform deep-dive | [Research](research/signal_analysis/fourier_transform.qmd) |
| 2026-04-01 | Moving Average implementations | [Algorithms](algorithms/moving_average.qmd) |
| 2026-04-01 | Project setup guide | [Quick Start](quickstart/setup.qmd) |

<style>
.hero-banner {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 50%, #0f3460 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 3rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  margin: 1rem 0 2rem 0;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
}
.card {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin: 0.5rem;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
</style>
